alternateTitle: Who Put Tomatoes In My Egusi?
description: The classic Yoruba melon seed soup with leafy greens. Will you honor tradition or invite chaos?

controversialFacts: Some add ogiri (fermented locust beans), others consider it taboo.
The 'Egusi Ijebu' variant uses no vegetables at all.
Frying egusi in palm oil before adding stock is a matter of tribal identity.
